blockingIssues.description: HeuristicAgent.act only inspects state.active_incidents and does not inspect obs.active_alerts before choosing actions, so it can return NoOp when alerts indicate bad_config without active_incidents. This does not satisfy the feature requirement to use active_incidents/alerts from observation to determine fault type.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add concrete guidance for meeting the Docker <500MB target with openenv-core transitive dependencies (what can be safely trimmed, what must remain) to reduce trial-and-error rebuild cycles.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: dockerfile review noted repeated rebuild/debug iterations and explicit worker skill feedback requesting this guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align documented demo entrypoint with operational command source of truth: either document top-level `demo/run_demo.py` compatibility explicitly or update structure docs to match `python -m demo.run_demo` in services.yaml.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ascii-renderer-and-demo review identified mismatch between AGENTS.md project structure and .factory/services.yaml demo command.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Explicitly require compatibility with `uv run python -m demo.run_demo` (services.yaml command) when implementing demo functionality, even if code primarily lives under package modules.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ascii-renderer-and-demo worker added a wrapper for command compatibility and left skill feedback requesting path-compatibility guidance.
